title: Tbestmax Qtips Holder Bathroom Container, 10/7 OZ Cotton Ball/Swabs Dispenser, Apothecary Jar Organizer for Storage Brown Wood Lids
description:
About this item
Plastic
You will get 3 small cotton holder in the package- 7 oz * 1 pcs and 10oz * 2 pcs
Made of durable plastic material, the lid is wood, and the color of each lid is naturally occurring, so there will be a color difference between each lid
Size - 7 oz qtip dispenser - 2.8x3x3.4 in, 10oz cotton ball holder - 3.5x2.7 in
Restroom Organizer - Apothecary jar perfect for Q-tips, cotton balls, cotton rounds,and flossers,or any other bathroom necessities and accessories
Clear storage jars is functional and decorative,not just for the bathroom, also perfect in the kitchen or living room
reviews_5s: I love these! They’re a much prettier method for organizing and storing small, single-use bathroom items. I use them to store flossers, Q-tips, and cotton balls. The wooden lids are light and easy to lift, but they also stay in place perfectly. The containers as a whole are light, but the plastic looks like glass - great quality for the price!I purchased these to hold Q-tips, cotton balls and facial cotton rounds in my bathroom. I like the look of them, that they match and are easy to wipe down and clean. Easy to refill and move around the bathroom counter to clean around. I highly recommend!The set matched perfectly with my shower curtain that had the same design and soap dispenser. It's plastic which I would prefer glass but it still looks classy. So I am happy.I enjoying having these items in use and on display in my bedroom.Easy to use and clean out, perfect to organize every day necessities. They are plastic but don’t feel cheap as they’re a little on the thicker side. They do come with stick on labels I just personally like it better without.This product makes it easy for my everyday grooming! Everyone who have oneThey are cute and arrived as described.Great for helping organizing teen vanityThis goes well in a bathroom, exam room, or anywhere that you desire to store nick nacks and don't want to clash with your current decor or color scheme. It blends very well with my current color decor while adding storage with clear visibility of the containers content. The price is great as well. Enjoy.I bought this item for my bathroom and it looks great with my matching mirror.
reviews_1s: Its cute design and the promise of a convenient storage solution for my bathroom essentials attracted me. While the aesthetics of the container lived up to expectations, it left me disappointed by its overall quality and durability. The container's design is undeniably charming, adding a touch of whimsy to my bathroom countertop. The clear acrylic material gives it a sleek appearance, and the lid's easy access dispenser is a practical feature. However, my enthusiasm quickly waned when the fragility of the product became apparent. Within less than five minutes of opening the package, the container suffered a crack from a minor drop. It astonished me at how easily the acrylic material succumbed to such a brief fall. This fragility significantly impacts the overall quality of the product and raises concerns about its longevity, especially in a bathroom environment where accidental drops are not uncommon. While the Q-tips Holder Bathroom Container serves its purpose when handled with extreme care, the lack of durability is a significant drawback. I expected a product that could withstand everyday use and occasional mishandling, but unfortunately, this container falls short in that regard.Item is not functional, the q tip dispenser does not dispense, you have to manually put more q tips into the bottom part, they do not fall in there on their own. The lids also don’t stay on well. Cheaply made.My product came broken. Will send it back. Also smaller than I thought they would be.I was not happy with this product. Even the tops look cheap. Not a good purchaseI bought this for my bathroom counter when I was redoing my bathroom. Unfortunately, they look a lot bigger than they are online. In addition to that, the q tips do not line up well nor stay lined up well in the container so they don't roll down or come out easily. I donated these to the goodwill.So small and not good quality could find better at a dollar storeThe description said it was made of plastic, wood and glass. Absolutely No Glass.Will not buy againHorrible cheap made product! It’s so tiny you can’t fit anything in it not to mention how junky the material is! Dollar store makes better ones for a lot less cheaper! Don’t waste your money on this tiny set!Too small. Put the swabs in and didn't fit
